description: Facebook Pages via the Meta Graph API — list the pages you manage, read their posts, and publish new ones.
data_handling: Reads the connected user's managed pages and those pages' posts; publishes posts agents compose. Personal profile data beyond id/name is never read.

operations.name: page-posts.list
operations.description: Recent posts on a managed page

operations.name: page-posts.create
operations.description: Publish a post to a managed page
